# OCTOREFLEX DNS Blocklist
#
# Format: one domain per line, # for comments
# Subdomains are automatically blocked (e.g., blocking evil.com blocks sub.evil.com)
#
# Last updated: 2026-04-11

# Malware C2 servers
malware-c2.example.com
botnet.example.net

# Phishing domains
phishing.example.org
fake-bank.example.com

# Crypto miners
crypto-miner.example.io
coinhive.example.net

# Suspicious domains
suspicious.example.biz
badactor.example.info

# Known ransomware infrastructure
ransomware-drop.example.com
encryption-pay.example.net

# Data exfiltration
exfil.example.org
upload.malicious.example.com
